message:
Add WebSocket HTTP upgrade extractor for web framework

Introduce WebSocketUpgrade as a FromRequest extractor implementing
RFC 6455 upgrade validation. Validates method, Upgrade/Connection
headers, Sec-WebSocket-Version (13), and Sec-WebSocket-Key (16-byte
base64). Supports subprotocol and extension negotiation, produces
101 Switching Protocols response with correct accept key, and bridges
to the existing net::websocket::WebSocketAcceptor.

Adds StatusCode::SWITCHING_PROTOCOLS (101) to the response module.
Registers the new websocket module in web/mod.rs. Updates the ambient
audit finding line number for middleware.rs to reflect the file's
growth. Fixes resolve_trace_id to return owned Strings and suppresses
unused-variable warnings in RequestTraceMiddleware::call.

Includes ~30 unit tests covering header validation, case insensitivity,
protocol/extension negotiation, response construction, handler pattern
integration, accept key RFC 6455 test vectors, and ServerHandshake
compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

         severity: Severity::Warning,
         description: "Instant::now() in TimeoutMiddleware::call()",
